subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down from Our presence unto a people who understand. Verily, it beareth witness, even as God Himself hath testified ere the creation of all things, that there is none other God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لقوم یفقهون انه یشهد بما شهد الله قبل خلق الاشیاء انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
